name: WorkRamp
description: WorkRamp learning management system for employee training

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to WorkRamp as admin
2. Go to Admin Settings → Integrations
3. Copy your API key
4. Paste it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: WorkRamp → Admin Settings → Integrations → API Key

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists WorkRamp users to verify training platform access is managed
